calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-08-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-01-2023 Continued To Aug-08-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-06-2023 Continued To Aug-01-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Ericka Haraguchi appearing in person for and with David Longa (petitioner).

Discussion was held with regard to Probate Examiner's notes and outstanding issues not complete. The Court finds no good cause. The Court issues sanctions in the amount of $250.00 against Erika Miyuki Haraguchi Pursuant to CCP 177.5 payable within 10 days of the order. Petition for first and final waiver on account and report of administrator is continued to August 01, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel to file all corrections by July 18. 2023.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Brown. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-06-2023 Text Ruling

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-23-2023 Continued To Jun-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Erika Miyuki Haraguchi (attorney) to appear on June 06, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against her for failure to appear per CCP 128. Petition for first and final waiver of account and report of administrator is also continued to that date.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-11-2023 Continued To May-23-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-21-2023 Continued To Apr-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-24-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Continued To Oct-24-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Erika M. Haraguchi, via Zoom, for David Longa, Personal Representative.

Ms. Haraguchi advises that she has found it difficult to contact her client and advised him via papers mailed to him that she is not inclined to continue to serve as his counsel and that she subsequently received a reply from a member of her client's family requesting her to remain as counsel. The court reminds counsel what it is expecting to move this matter forward and close the estate. Counsel is advised that the court will be expecting her to file either a petition for final distribution or a petition to approve report on status of administration prior to the next hearing date in this matter.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
